title: bony input script
description: bony.input-script.v1: a JSON file that drives the golden-gen harness through one or more time-sampled poses, optionally with named state-machine inputs.

format.description: Sentinel that identifies this file as a bony input script.

asset.description: Basename of the conformance asset file (e.g. 'm2_rig.bony'). Resolved relative to the sibling assets/ directory: conformance/scripts/<asset> -> conformance/assets/<asset>.

samples.description: Ordered list of time samples to evaluate. Each sample drives one golden-gen invocation.

t.description: Time in seconds at which to sample the skeleton. Passed as --t to golden-gen. Currently only t=0.0 (setup pose) is executable; non-zero values require an animation clip, which is not yet part of the format.

inputs.description: Named state-machine inputs at this sample. Keys are input names; values are booleans, numbers, or strings. Empty object ({}) means no inputs (setup pose evaluation only). Currently reserved: the consumer harness cannot forward inputs until state-machine support lands (M8).
